code: import api from'./api';const menuService={getAll:async function(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const response=await api.get('/menu',{params});return response.data;},getById:async id=>{const response=await api.get("/menu/".concat(id));return response.data;},create:async data=>{const response=await api.post('/menu',data);return response.data;},update:async(id,data)=>{const response=await api.put("/menu/".concat(id),data);return response.data;},delete:async id=>{const response=await api.delete("/menu/".concat(id));return response.data;}};export default menuService;
